body.title: Atomic input chunker — sentence/clause/discourse-marker split
body.result: chunker.chunk_input() pure function. Sentence-split with quote-awareness + abbrev tolerance + discourse-marker force-splits + clause fallback on oversized. Chunk dataclass with kind (sentence/clause/fragment) and context_carry tuple. 18 tests. Commit febc51e3.
body.description:
Long input borks preparse timeouts; multi-intent input (greeting + question + meta-comment in one message) gets mashed into a single muddled classification. No reusable atomic splitter exists. Build a pure function chunker that emits sentence-level atoms with force-splits at discourse markers and a clause-level fallback for oversized sentences. Chunks carry a context-carry field referencing the prior 1-2 atoms (for pronoun/reference resolution by downstream consumers). No routing or capacity awareness here — pure splitter, reusable everywhere preparse runs.

**Affected files:** new module `wild_igor/igor/cognition/chunker.py`; new `tests/test_input_chunker.py`
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not (covered); oop-first (pure function is fine — stateless and reused; note in docstring); no other palace checks apply (no SQLite, no memory schemas, no cross-subsystem entanglement).
**Scope boundary:** IN: sentence-split with quote-awareness; discourse-marker force-splits (but/however/also/oh-and/by-the-way/anyway); size-cap triggers clause-level split; paragraph boundaries are hard; context-carry field on each chunk. OUT: routing (T-preparse-router); per-machine capacity awareness (T-capacity-profiler); merge/reconcile logic downstream.
**Test plan:** unit tests cover — single-sentence passthrough; multi-sentence split on .!?; quote-aware (don't split inside "quoted. text."); discourse-marker force-splits at mid-sentence boundaries; clause-fallback when a single sentence exceeds token cap; paragraph double-newline = hard boundary; empty input returns empty list; single-word input returns one chunk; context-carry populated correctly (chunk N sees chunks N-1 and N-2).
